title: fix(sops): restore CI age recipient dropped by #10255
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Finding the lost keys
gist.blurb: Our CI pipeline accidentally got locked out of the secret garden, but we've restored its access. Deployments are back to buzzing along smoothly!
gist.summary: Restored the CI age recipient in the SOPS configuration to fix deployment decryption failures caused by a stale merge.
gist.impact: Internal CI pipelines can once again decrypt secrets and deploy updates successfully.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a glowing digital key, helping the Monitor Robot unlock a server cabinet. Represents restoring access/keys to the CI system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee holding a glowing digital key, helping a chunky CRT monitor robot unlock a retro server cabinet. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee holding a glowing digital key, helping a chunky CRT monitor robot unlock a retro server cabinet.
